task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient record for Elena Petrov.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the patient chart or profile for 'Elena Petrov' (ID: P00011).

task_completion.description: Open the active visit for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows an active visit, encounter, or consultation view specifically for Elena Petrov.

task_completion.description: Order a laboratory test appropriate for thyroid function monitoring.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An order entry screen or list showing a thyroid-related lab test (e.g., TSH, Free T4, Free T3, thyroid antibodies, or complete metabolic panel) being selected or added.

task_completion.description: Order a second, distinct laboratory test appropriate for thyroid function monitoring.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An order entry screen or list showing a second, different thyroid-related lab test being selected or added alongside the first.

task_completion.description: Order an imaging study appropriate for thyroid evaluation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An order entry screen or list showing a thyroid-related imaging study (e.g., thyroid ultrasound, neck ultrasound, or radioactive iodine scan) being selected or added.

task_completion.description: Successfully submit and save the orders within the active visit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visit summary, order history, or confirmation screen clearly displaying that at least 2 distinct lab tests and 1 imaging study have been successfully ordered for Elena Petrov.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the web-based EMR GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to http://localhost:3000 showing the clinic application, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual application to place orders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The orders are visible within the EMR interface's standard forms and tables, not typed into a text editor or a locally created mock file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the order confirmation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements/Console tab) are not open and being used to alter the DOM to falsely display completed orders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Elena Petrov. Patient ID: P00011. The task requires a minimum of 2 distinct laboratory orders (acceptable terms include TSH, Free T4, Free T3, thyroid antibodies, complete metabolic panel, creatinine) and a minimum of 1 imaging order (acceptable terms include thyroid ultrasound, neck ultrasound, radioactive iodine scan, radiograph, nuclear). These orders must be placed within the patient's active visit.
